entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: Eleusine Coracana (L.) Gaertn., the crop studied for grain nutrient diversity

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The existing diversity within the germplasm essential for initiating a successful plant breeding program

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program aimed at improving crop traits using genetic variability

entities.name: NUTRIENT DIVERSITY STUDIES
entities.description: Review of studies conducted on finger millet germplasm globally to assess nutrient variability

entities.name: QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the grain that were determined to have very high variability

entities.name: NUTRIENT CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of essential nutrients present in the grain of finger millet

entities.name: GRAIN COLOR
entities.description: A morphological trait where darker grains are associated with higher nutrient content

entities.name: GLUME COVERING
entities.description: A morphological trait where enclosed grains have higher nutrient content

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL MARKERS
entities.description: Physical traits like grain color and glume covering used to identify nutrient content

entities.name: EAST AND SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where local cultivars and varieties had significantly lower levels of essential nutrients

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: An essential nutrient (Ca) found in finger millet

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: An essential nutrient (Fe) found in finger millet

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential nutrient (Zn) found in finger millet

entities.name: COUNTRY OF ORIGIN
entities.description: A factor that was highly significant for the nutrient content of the accessions

entities.name: EASTERN AND SOUTHERN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where accessions had significantly lower nutrient contents

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A trait that was not significantly correlated with any nutrient content

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A subset of finger millet germplasm showing substantial variability for grain nutrients

entities.name: LOCAL GERMPLASM
entities.description: Local genetic resources showing substantial variability for grain nutrients
